title: HUF Sufficiency Frontier — Compression Proof on OWID World Energy Data

verdict.summary: ALL 4 TESTS PASS. HUF compression is empirically proven across share, per-capita, absolute, and combined column sets. The Sufficiency Frontier demonstrates that 4-9 roots reconstruct the OWID energy matrix with R² > 0.75 in all cases. Compression ratios range from 3.0:1 to 6.0:1.
